index e3a6cf2f..8d5d17e7 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Tracking/InventoryProfileOffsetting.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Inventory/Tracking/InventoryProfileOffsetting.Codeunit.al
@@ -1621,8 +1621,16 @@ codeunit 99000854 "Inventory Profile Offsetting"
                 CanBeRescheduled := CheckScheduleOut(SupplyInvtProfile, DemandDueDate, NewSupplyDate, LimitedHorizon);
                 if CanBeRescheduled then
                     WeAreSureThatDatesMatch := not ScheduleAllOutChangesSequence(SupplyInvtProfile, NewSupplyDate)
-                else
-                    NextState := NextState::ReduceSupply;
+                else begin
+                    // For planning components from released/firm production orders, don't reduce supply
+                    // Instead, match quantities or create new supply if needed
+                    if (DemandInvtProfile."Source Type" = Database::"Planning Component") and
+                       (DemandInvtProfile."Planning Level Code" > 0)
+                    then
+                        NextState := NextState::MatchQty
+                    else
+                        NextState := NextState::ReduceSupply;
+                end;
             end else begin
                 WeAreSureThatDatesMatch := true;
                 CanBeRescheduled := SupplyInvtProfile."Planning Flexibility" = SupplyInvtProfile."Planning Flexibility"::Unlimited;
